invalid_file.description: The file does not start with the valid Synapse signature: /syn/
invalid_file.resolution: Ensure you are opening a valid .syn file created with Synapse

invalid_type.description: The specified variable or return type is not supported
invalid_type.resolution: Use one of: int, float, str, bool, svar

block_not_closed.description: A code block (function, if, loop) is missing its closing brace
block_not_closed.resolution: Ensure all blocks end with a closing '}'

missing_block_start.description: A code block is missing its opening brace
missing_block_start.resolution: Ensure all blocks start with an opening '{'

missing_block.message: A set must have it's values inside {}
missing_block.description: A code block is missing its opening brace e/or ending brace
missing_block.resolution: Ensure all blocks start with an opening '{' and ending '}'

invalid_expression.description: The mathematical or logical expression contains errors
invalid_expression.resolution: Check the expression syntax and variable names

boolean_value.resolution: Use only 'True' or 'False' (case-sensitive) for boolean variables

loop_variable_reassignment.description: Variable name may conflict with interpreter internal variables
loop_variable_reassignment.resolution: Avoid using 'i', 'j', 'index' as variable names in loops

variable_not_found.message: Variable was not found or does not exists: '{variable}'
variable_not_found.description: Variable does not exist or was not defined
variable_not_found.resolution: Check variable name spelling and ensure it's defined before use

invalid_definition.description: Function declaration does not follow the required syntax

parameter_mismatch.message: Function '{function}' expects {expected} parameters, but {provided} were provided
parameter_mismatch.description: Function call has incorrect number of arguments
parameter_mismatch.resolution: Check the function definition and provide the correct number of parameters

function_not_found.message: Function '{function}' not found or does not exist
function_not_found.description: Attempted to call an undefined function
function_not_found.resolution: Check function name spelling and ensure it's defined before calling

type_count_mismatch.message: Return expects {expected} values of types {types}, but found {found} values: {values}
type_count_mismatch.description: Number of return types doesn't match number of values
type_count_mismatch.resolution: Ensure the number of types matches the number of values to return

conversion_failed.description: User input could not be converted to the specified type
conversion_failed.resolution: Ensure input matches the expected type (numbers for int/float)

max_iterations_exceeded.description: Loop executed too many times, possible infinite loop
max_iterations_exceeded.resolution: Check loop condition and ensure it eventually becomes false

invalid_condition.description: Loop or if condition contains errors
invalid_condition.resolution: Check condition syntax and variable values

invalid_math_value.resolution: Use only numeric values (int/float) for math operations

invalid_operation.resolution: Use one of: sqrt, cbrt, fac, round, floor, ceil, expo, gcd, log

parameter_count.message: Operation '{operation}' requires exactly {required} value(s), but {provided} were provided
parameter_count.description: Incorrect number of parameters for mathematical operation
parameter_count.resolution: Check the documentation for required parameters for each operation

unrecognized_element.description: Unknown command or syntax element encountered
unrecognized_element.resolution: Check documentation for supported commands and syntax

constant_not_found.resolution: Use one of: pi, e, tau

set_not_found.description: Attempted to access a set that does not exist
set_not_found.resolution: Check set name spelling and ensure it's created before access

index_out_of_range.message: Index {index} is out of range. Maximum index is {max_index}
index_out_of_range.description: Attempted to access an element with an invalid index
index_out_of_range.resolution: Use an index between 0 and the set size minus one

type_mismatch.message: Value recived is not int/float as expected
type_mismatch.description: Remember using only numbers for int variables
type_mismatch.resolution: Ensure variable assignments and return values match their declared types
